memory_shared_brain.recommendation: Git-backed Obsidian/markdown as primary human/source brain; Qdrant as derived semantic index; Neo4j as derived relationship graph after schemas stabilize
memory_shared_brain.already_on_vps: Qdrant/Neo4j presence checked in Section 4; use only if running and wired

orchestration.recommendation: Custom Hermes routing + GitHub Issues/Actions control plane; n8n for external event glue; LangGraph only for app-specific deterministic agent flows

knowledge_base.recommendation: Obsidian/markdown + Git + Qdrant RAG; avoid Notion as source-of-truth lock-in for CompanyOS

secrets.recommendation: Infisical or Vault for organization/runtime secrets; GitHub Secrets for CI; env-only only bootstrap

observability.recommendation: Grafana + Prometheus/Loki/Tempo for infra; Langfuse for LLM traces; /migration/audit as founder-facing report
